description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:9.0 Docker image and a mysql:latest service. Define stages test and build, and set a cache for packages/ and paket-files/. Add a test_job in the test stage that runs on merge_requests, main, and tags, executes dotnet run --project src/Domain.Specs --nunit-summary testResults/Domain.xml, dotnet run --project src/Infrastructure.Specs --nunit-summary testResults/Infrastructure.xml, and dotnet run --project src/Server.Specs --nunit-summary testResults/Server.xml, sets MySQL variables (MYSQL_DATABASE, MYSQL_HOST, MYSQL_PASSWORD, MYSQL_RANDOM_ROOT_PASSWORD, MYSQL_USER), and publishes JUnit reports from testResults/*.xml as artifacts expiring in 1 day. Add a build_job in the build stage that runs only on tags, runs dotnet publish -c Release -o out/server-manager src/Server, and stores the out/ directory as an artifact named ServerManager-$CI_COMMIT_TAG. Add a review_build_job in the build stage that runs only on merge_requests, is manual, depends on test_job, runs dotnet publish -c Debug -o out/server-manager src/Server, and stores out/ as an artifact named ServerManager-MR$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_ID-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA expiring in 1 day. Include a before_script that restores dotnet tools and packages with dotnet tool restore and dotnet restore.
